title: Boarding Pricing, Deposit & Odd-Hours Rules
pageIntro: Use this page to define how your boarding stay is priced, when extra pickup or drop-off fees apply, how long-stay discounts work, and what deposit is due at booking. Keep these rules simple and clear so clients and staff understand what will be charged.
nightlyRatesBody: Enter the normal nightly boarding rate by number of dogs booked together. These rates are the starting point before any stay-length discounts, memberships, or extra pickup/drop-off charges are applied.
nightlyTierPlaceholder: Enter the nightly price for {count} dog{suffix}
nightlyTierHelperSingle: This is your standard nightly boarding rate when 1 dog is booked.
nightlyTierHelperMulti: This is your standard nightly boarding rate when {count} dogs are booked together.
checkoutRulesBody: Use this section if your boarding business works like a hotel. You can allow a complimentary pickup window and then attach invoice-library items to later pickup windows such as half-day boarding or a full extra day.
complimentaryPickupCutoffHelper: Example: if pickup by 11:00 AM should be included with the boarding night, set 11:00 AM here. Pickups after that time can be charged through the windows below.
checkoutWindowRulesBody: Create one rule per charged pickup window. Example: 11:00 AM to 1:00 PM = Half-Day Boarding. After 1:00 PM = Full-Day Boarding.
noEndTimeOption: No end time (use through the end of the day)
invoiceItemHelper: Choose the exact invoice-library item you want the system to use. This avoids pricing guesswork and keeps your billing consistent.
checkoutWindowNotesPlaceholder: Explain when this rule should be used so staff do not need to guess.
lengthDiscountsBody: Use this section to reward longer stays. Create tiers such as 10 nights or more. The highest matching tier will be used, and any additional assigned client discounts can still stack on top afterward.
specialNightlyRatesHelper: When you use a special nightly rate, enter the discounted nightly rate for each dog-count tier you want this stay-length rule to override.
lengthDiscountNotesPlaceholder: Explain what this stay-length tier is meant to do.
depositRulesBody: Use deposit tiers when the amount due at booking should change based on stay length. You can charge a number of nights, a flat dollar amount, or a percentage of the included charges.
depositIncludeTitle: What Should Be Included In The Deposit Calculation?
depositIncludeBody: Choose which categories count toward the deposit due today. Example: some businesses want boarding nights only, while others also want grooming or odd-hours fees included in the deposit.
depositCategory_boardingNights: Include the boarding stay subtotal after automatic discounts and membership coverage.
depositCategory_groomingAddOns: Include grooming add-ons selected during booking.
depositCategory_boardingAddOns: Include boarding add-ons selected during booking.
depositCategory_checkoutWindowFees: Include checkout-day pickup-window fees such as half-day or full-day boarding charges.
nightsRequiredHelper: This only prorates the boarding-stay portion. Any other categories you included above will still be added in full.
depositNotesPlaceholder: Explain the purpose of this deposit tier for staff.
oddHoursBody: These rules connect your special time windows from Business Settings to exact invoice-library items. Time availability is controlled on the main Business Settings page. Pricing is attached here.
oddHour_earlyDropOff_body: Use this if you allow clients to arrive before you officially open and you charge one flat fee for the reservation.
oddHour_afterHoursDropOff_body: Use this if you allow clients to arrive after you close and you charge one flat fee for the reservation.
oddHour_beforeHoursPickUp_body: Use this if you allow clients to pick up before you open and you charge one flat fee for the reservation.
oddHour_afterHoursPickUp_body: Use this if you allow clients to pick up after you close and you charge one flat fee for the reservation.
availableWindowsTitle: Current Time Windows From Business Settings
availableWindowsMissing: No matching time windows are currently configured on the main Boarding & Daycare Business Settings page.
oddHourNotesPlaceholder: Explain when staff should use this odd-hours fee rule.
addonDescription: Use this section for simple boarding add-ons that may be selected during booking, such as treats, extra playtime, or medication administration. These are separate from odd-hours fees and hotel-style checkout charges.
noticeEnterOnePrice: Please enter at least one valid boarding nightly rate.
noticeSaveFailed: Failed to save boarding pricing rules.
